name: Delete head of Doubly Linked List
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement:
Given the head of a doubly linked list, remove the node at the head of the linked list and return the head of the modified list.


The head is the first node of the linked list.
constraints:
• n == Number of nodes in the linked list
  • 1 <= n <= 100
  • 0 <= ListNode.data <= 100

examples.explanation: The node with value 1 was removed.
Note that the head has null value after the removal.
